name: pr_cep_not_pt_defer_noadv
drl: rule NE when $a : A() not B(this after[60ms,80ms] $a) then end
comment: point not B(after $a), NO advance: the deferred not does NOT fire until the window closes (D-128's immediate-fire bug is gone). — graduated D-134 (§3B temporal-not firing-deferral port landed): the not-wall is down, engine==oracle. Was an engine_fenced recon witness.
